title: stachys arenaria
intro: Stachys arenaria, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and calm the nervous system. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Wood Betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits, which include reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system.
